data.text: SECOND FELYSIAN PLANET IN THE FRANCE IV SYSTEM.IT HAD A GRAVITY
HIGHER THAN OUR HOME, THIS PLANET ALSO HOLDS MANY SECRETS.
AT 232:43 THERE IS A TOURIST ATTRACTION WHICH IS A STEEP VALLEY
AND A LARGE MOUNTAIN DIVIDE THE VALLEY. IT IS A GREAT VIEW ATOP
THE MOUNTAIN! STAY ALERT FOR MENDOZA IMPERIAL NEWS!
